ksa_text: Skill in influencing organizational decision-makers and cross-functional stakeholders to adopt data-driven approaches, including framing technical value propositions in business terms, building consensus across competing priorities, and overcoming resistance through evidence rather than authority.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the skill contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('influencing organizational decision.maker'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is strong (0.4628, top tier for this dataset); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
